input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Find NFL Steelers-Texans result and Divisional Round matchups
with open('articles/2026/01/13/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        for kw in ['Steelers', 'Texans', 'Divisional', 'NFL playoff', 'Seahawks', 'Bears', 'Broncos', 'Patriots', 'Bills', 'Rams', '49ers']:
            if kw in title:
                print(title[:140])
                break
" | head -15
